evidence.page_title: Pro-Iranian protesters killed in Karachi after storming US consulate
evidence.title: Pro-Iranian protesters killed in Karachi after storming US consulate | CNN
evidence.description: Several people have died and dozens injured following protests at the heavily fortified US consulate compound in Karachi, according to Pakistan’s emergency services. CNN’s Sophia Saifi reports.
evidence.text:
Video Ad Feedback
Pro-Iranian protesters killed in Karachi after storming US consulate
Several people have died and dozens injured following protests at the heavily fortified US consulate compound in Karachi, according to Pakistan’s emergency services. CNN's Sophia Saifi reports.
1:30
• Source:
CNN
